ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the poll was conducted */,
  "poll_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll was conducted */,
  "poll_source" TEXT /* Source of the poll (e.g., Gallup, Pew Research) */,
  "poll_title" TEXT /* Title or name of the poll */,
  "poll_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the poll */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the poll */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll results */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the poll data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval rating */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the rating belongs to */,
  "net_approval" INTEGER /* Net approval rating (approve - disapprove) */,
  "approve" INTEGER /* Percentage of respondents who approve */,
  "disapprove" INTEGER /* Percentage of respondents who disapprove */,
  "dk_refused" INTEGER /* Percentage of respondents who don't know or refused to answer */,
  "leader_name" TEXT /* Name of the leader being rated */,
  "leader_position" TEXT /* Position of the leader (e.g., President, Prime Minister) */,
  "poll_question" TEXT /* Specific question asked in the poll */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the approval ratings */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the approval ratings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_ratings_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the demographic group belongs to */,
  "demographic_group" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group (e.g., age, gender, education) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the demographic group */,
  "demographic_type" TEXT /* Type of demographic (e.g., age, gender, education) */,
  "demographic_description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_ratings" (
  "demographic_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic rating */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the approval rating the demographic rating belongs to */,
  "approval_rating" INTEGER /* Approval rating for the demographic group */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the demographic ratings */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the demographic ratings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_ratings_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_ratings_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES approval_ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the user's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being accessed */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the poll or rating */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll or rating was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES approval_ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll the version belongs to */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes describing the changes made in this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the version data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES approval_ratings ("rating_id")
)
